location_check_description: To ensure optimal service speed and order security at the table, please confirm your location.
location_check_benefit_1: Orders sent directly to the kitchen immediately.
location_check_benefit_2: Absolute security: No location history stored.
location_check_benefit_3: Data automatically deleted when you leave.
location_check_privacy_note: By continuing, you agree to our privacy policy.
loc_timeout: Location request took too long. Please check your GPS settings and try again.
browser_no_loc: Your browser does not support geolocation. Please use another browser (Chrome, Safari).
too_far: You are too far from the restaurant (:distance m). Please scan the QR code at your table to order.
permission_denied: You denied location access. Please enable it in browser settings or rescan the QR code.
pos_unavailable: Unable to determine location. Please ensure GPS is enabled.
timeout: Location request timed out. Please try again in an area with better signal.
order_fail: Error sending order. Please try again.
conn_error: Server connection error. Please check your network.
call_waiter_confirm: Do you want to call a waiter?
payment_confirm: Do you want to request payment?
no_desc: No description available for this item.
wait_for_waiter: Please wait for staff confirmation and service.
